User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores core registered user details, authentication profiles, and system access roles.

uid.description: Unique user identification from Firebase Authentication.

role.description: Security access level. Admins gain access to parameters override dashboard.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when account profile was registered.

AdminSetting.title: Global Admin & Market Config
AdminSetting.description: Stores real API keys, alert broadcasts, and admin settings overrides.

id.description: Static ID of configuration e.g. target_market

nseBseApiUrl.description: Base URL of real-time market API configuration.

nseBseApiKey.description: Encrypted or masked API key credential.

customBroadcastAlert.description: Top marquee ribbon message broadcast to all students.

updatedBy.description: UID of admin who modified the settings.

UserAlert.title: User Price Alert Trigger
UserAlert.description: Saved price alert trigger details synchronized server-side.

CustomNewsItem.title: Custom Educational Market News
CustomNewsItem.description: News items broadcasts posted dynamically via the Admin Board.

source.description: Editorial or market agency citation source.

category.description: Sectors tags like IT, PSU, Pharma etc.

settings/{configId}.description: Administrative configurations and private integration API credentials.

alerts/{alertId}.description: Dynamic stock alerts registered to students.

news/{newsId}.description: Dynamic custom news postings published by admins.
